ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "vendor_type" TEXT /* Type of vendor (e.g., supplier, contractor) */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the vendor */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_addresses_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who sent the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was sent */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice is due */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., received, processed, paid) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms of the invoice (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "purchase_order" TEXT /* Purchase order number associated with the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the update belongs to */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., received, processed, paid) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_status_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, wire transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment term */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the term belongs to */,
  "term_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment term */,
  "term_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of payment term (e.g., installment, lump sum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_terms_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accounts payable, manager, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., finance, procurement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the invoice */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_comments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_attachments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)
